title: BEZIA Wok Non Stick with Lid, Inductions Wok Pan 30cm, Stir-Fry Pan with Wooden Handle, Large Capacity for 3-5 People, Ovensafe, Ideal for Gas, All Hobs, Easy Clean, Granite
features: 5X Longer Non-Stick Life: The triple-layer granite coating delivers exceptional non-stick performance. Its "natural oil film surface" creates an effortless release layer, enabling healthy cooking with minimal oil. The non-stick surface lasts 5 times longer, while also resisting scratches for easy cleaning

1 Wok, 6 Cooking Ways: This premium aluminum wok heats evenly and is built to last. It withstands high temperatures without warping, making it ideal for frying, stir-frying, sautéing, boiling, steaming, and even oven use

The 38° Curve & Wooden Handle Comfort: Featuring a detachable wooden handle for a cool, secure grip, this wok is engineered around a 38° cooking angle. This fundamental design ensures optimal heat distribution and natural, ergonomic motion for both quick stir-frying and precise simmering, redefining your interaction with the stove

Suitable for All Hobs: Featuring a flat stainless steel-clad base with an integrated magnetic layer, this wok is perfectly compatible with all cooktops: induction, electric, ceramic/glass, and gas. Enjoy easy and efficient cooking on any stove

38° Golden Arc, 30cm Ideal Size: With its flat base and lightweight design, this 30cm wok is exceptionally easy to handle. The 38-degree curved wall ensures rapid, even heating for an ultimate cooking experience, perfect for preparing delicious Asian stir-fries or hearty family meals
description: Product Description The Pan That Can – ideal for 1–3 people. Its premium 5X enhanced coating ensures food slides right off and cleans up quickly. With even heating and a fitted lid, it cooks efficiently and reliably. A practical, easy-to-use pan for everyday meals. 5x Durable, 3-Layer Non-Stick This pan delivers 5x long-lasting power, powered by its 3-layer granite coating. When cooking, it forms an oil film that wraps around food—unlocking top-tier non-stick performance, just smooth, easy cooking. Heat Fast, Cook Steady This wok heats fast and evenly—no lopsided hot spots. Its flat bottom stays steady on stoves. The 38° angle, Ideal for smooth stir-frying. Whip up fresh, flavorful meals with zero fuss. Clean Pan, Perfect Plan – Featuring a natural granite coating free from PFOA, PFOS, Cd, Pb, and other harmful substances. Its aluminum core ensures fast and even heat distribution for perfectly cooked meals — safely and effortlessly every time. Wood That Would: Cool, Steady & Ready This uniquely designed handle combines safety and convenience. Made of wood, it’s heat-resistant and slip-proof for secure, comfortable handling. The ergonomic shape fits naturally in your hand, while the hanging design allows for easy storage and quick setup. One Pan, All Plans This pan works seamlessly on all hob types — ceramic, gas, induction, halogen, and electric. No need to worry about compatibility; just one pan that fits your kitchen and your lifestyle. Cook with freedom, no matter the heat source. One Pan, All Flavours Bright Cook all kinds of delicious dishes with ease—whether you're searing, simmering, baking, or serving. From a sizzling steak on the stove, to a fragrant cake in the oven, to a warm family meal straight to the table, this versatile companion puts you in full control.
